channel.title: Static Website on Adriaan Knapen
channel.description: Recent content in Static Website on Adriaan Knapen

item.title: How to Build a Plugin for Docusaurus v2
item.description: How to Build a Plugin for Docusaurus v2 At ClaimR we have been using Docusaurus v2 for our developer and documentation website for a while now. After a couple of months of using it we can confidently say that we’re very happy with our choice. Docusaurus comes batteries-included, so you immediately get a lot of value, while it is flexible enough to tailor it to your needs if there’s something you like differently.
